description: Style NoteTonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a cowl neckline, this teal blue printed top has raglan sleeves, elasticated on the shoulders, designed with a loose and a broad band on the hemMaterial and Care65% polyester and 35% viscoseHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
